ModMetadata.Name: PgpVerifyHelper
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description: Developer tooling. Scenario-driven verification helper for Power Grid Plus and related power mods. Not a player-facing mod; do not ship.
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: <size="30"><color=#ffa500>PgpVerifyHelper</color></size> Developer tooling. Not a player-facing mod.
